title: SpinSmart Plasmid Purification Protocols
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"83a8c","text":"SpinSmart Plasmid Miniprep kits are designed to rapidly purify plasmid DNA from bacterial cultures.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":31}],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"emtts","text":" ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"8t1s8","text":"Please follow one of the protocols below, depending on whether you are purifying high-copy plasmid or low-copy plasmid/P1 constructs/cosmids.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
creator: Nicole Clouse
